nasb.text: They were saying this, testing Him, so that they might have grounds for accusing Him. But Jesus stooped down and with His finger wrote on the ground.

esv.text: This they said to test him, that they might have some charge to bring against him. Jesus bent down and wrote with his finger on the ground.

cnv.text: 他們說這話是要試探耶穌，要找把柄來控告他。耶穌卻彎下身，用指頭在地上寫字。

ccb.text: 他们这样问是要使耶稣落在他们的圈套里，可以有借口控告祂。耶稣却只是弯着腰用指头在地上写字。

csbs.text: 他们说这话是要试探耶稣，为要找把柄来控告他。 耶稣却弯下腰，开始用指头在地上写字。
